message:
feat(mermaid): class diagram annotation support (bd-2d9fm)

Add <<interface>>, <<abstract>>, <<enum>> annotation parsing and
rendering for class diagrams. Annotations detected from class members
with `<<...>>` syntax are stored on IrNode and rendered centered above
the class name in compartment nodes.

- Add `annotation` field to NodeDraft and propagate to IrNode
- Detect `<<...>>` patterns in ClassMember handler
- Update render_class_compartments with annotation row + dynamic height
- Upgrade class diagram support level from Partial to Supported
- Add test fixtures for class annotations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+%% fixture_id: class_annotations
+%% purpose: class annotations (<<interface>>, <<abstract>>, <<enum>>)
+classDiagram
+  class Shape {
+    <<abstract>>
+    +String color
+    +area() double
+    +draw() void
+  }
+  class Drawable {
+    <<interface>>
+    +render() void
+  }
+  class Color {
+    <<enum>>
+    RED
+    GREEN
+    BLUE
+  }
+  class Circle {
+    +double radius
+    +area() double
+    +draw() void
+  }
+  Shape <|-- Circle
+  Shape ..|> Drawable
+  Circle --> Color : uses

@@ -1,8 +1,13 @@
 %% fixture_id: class_basic
-%% purpose: class declarations + members + edges
+%% purpose: class declarations + members + edges + annotations
 classDiagram
   class User
   class Order
+  class Printable {
+    <<interface>>
+    +print() void
+  }
   User : +id
   User : +name
   User --> Order
+  User ..|> Printable
